meta.title: OmicsLake Reproducibility Limit Taxonomy
meta.objective: Evaluate known boundary conditions for fair reproducibility-tool assessment, including false positives, attribution gaps, and rollback precondition failures.

scenarios.title: Row order permutation only
scenarios.root_cause: Rows are permuted while value set is unchanged.
scenarios.fairness_risk: Hash-only drift checks can treat semantically equivalent tables as breakage.

scenarios.title: Sub-femtoscale numeric jitter
scenarios.root_cause: Tiny floating-point perturbation is below practical analysis tolerance.
scenarios.fairness_risk: Bit-level comparisons can flag negligible noise as reproducibility failure.

scenarios.title: Untracked external factor file drift
scenarios.root_cause: A local file outside OmicsLake changes and influences recomputation.
scenarios.fairness_risk: Drift is detectable, but root-cause attribution may remain coarse without explicit external dependency tracking.

scenarios.title: Rollback requested without snapshot label
scenarios.root_cause: No prior snapshot exists, but rollback is requested.
scenarios.fairness_risk: Auto-repair cannot restore to a missing reference point.

scenarios.title: Random-noise recomputation without fixed seed
scenarios.root_cause: Analysis includes a stochastic step with no seed management.
scenarios.fairness_risk: Tool should still detect drift and allow rollback when snapshots exist.
